steps.title: Spot the contrast between appearance and proven reality
steps.content: The method “seems rudimentary today,” yet the 2015 study shows it was remarkably accurate—this opposition between initial impression and factual finding is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Apply the concession signal
steps.content: ”That said” signals a contrast—it accepts the initial claim (rudimentary) while introducing evidence that refutes it. The other three signal consequence, rephrasing, or exemplification—none of which express the opposition. That matches choice B — B is correct.
